note: frasi parallele tra lingue: stesso id = stessa frase; l'inglese è il riferimento per la speech translation

samples.text: Il satellite nello spazio riceve il segnale e poi lo rimanda indietro quasi all'istante.
samples.en_ref: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

samples.text: Anche in conseguenza della sua relativa inaccessibilità, "Timbuctù" ha finito per diventare metafora di terra esotica e lontana.
samples.en_ref: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.

samples.text: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.
samples.en_ref: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

samples.text: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.
samples.en_ref: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.

samples.text: Der Satellit im Weltraum empfängt den Anruf und reflektiert ihn dann fast sofort zurück nach unten.
samples.en_ref: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

samples.text: Dies in Kombination mit seiner relativen Unzugänglichkeit hat „Timbuktu“ zu einer Metapher für exotische, ferne Länder werden lassen.
samples.en_ref: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.

samples.text: El satélite en el espacio recibe la llamada y, luego, la refleja de vuelta casi de forma instantánea.
samples.en_ref: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

samples.text: Ello, sumado a que resulta relativamente inaccesible, ha dado a «Tombuctú» una imagen de tierra exótica y lejana.
samples.en_ref: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.

samples.text: Le satellite reçoit l'appel dans l'espace puis le renvoie sur Terre, presque instantanément.
samples.en_ref: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

samples.text: Combiné à sa relative inaccessibilité, « Tombouctou » est devenu une métaphore pour les pays lointains et exotiques.
samples.en_ref: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.
